title: Location
summary: 9609 A Level — factors in plant and service location decisions.
learningObjectives: Analyse cost vs market proximity trade-offs.

simpleExplanation.title: Where to operate
simpleExplanation.summary: Location affects costs, supply chain access, labour availability, and closeness to customers.

sections.content: **Location** (9.1.1) opens **A Level Operations**. Weight **factors for the case country**.
